description: Style NoteAdd a pop meets punk edge to this season to your summer staples from sepia. Style this piece with non-typical wardrobe updaters like a chunky bracelet or clunky heels to add an instant spunk to your ensemble. For a girly vibe, wear this with a pastel scarf or shrug and a whimsical hair accessory - effortless spring style! Product DetailsAquamarine blue top, has a mandarin collar and a split neckline, has a buttoned placket with a concealer flap above it, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mid-arm metallic loops and a straight hem Material and Care100% cottonRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
